mapper.select: select id, name, min_days_to_expire as minDaysToExpire, max_days_to_expire as maxDaysToExpire, discount_rate as discountRate, priority, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from pricing_rule where id = #{id}
select id from pricing_rule where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into pricing_rule( name, min_days_to_expire, max_days_to_expire, discount_rate, priority, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user ) values ( #{name}, #{minDaysToExpire}, #{maxDaysToExpire}, #{discountRate}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser} )
mapper.update: update pricing_rule set name = #{name}, min_days_to_expire = #{minDaysToExpire}, max_days_to_expire = #{maxDaysToExpire}, discount_rate = #{discountRate}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ib.id as batchId, ib.batch_code as batchCode, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, datediff(ib.expiration_time, now()) as daysToExpire, greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) as availableStock, p.price as currentPrice from inventory_batch ib inner join product p on p.id = ib.product_id where ib.status = 1 and p.status = 1 and ib.expiration_time >= now() and datediff(ib.expiration_time, now()) <= 30 and greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 and not exists ( select 1 from pricing_rule pr where pr.name = concat(#{acceptedRuleNamePrefix}, ib.batch_code) ) order by datediff(ib.expiration_time, now()) asc, availableStock desc, ib.id desc limit #{limit}

select ib.id as batchId, ib.batch_code as batchCode, p.id as productId, p.name as productName, datediff('DAY', now(), ib.expiration_time) as daysToExpire, greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) as availableStock, p.price as currentPrice from inventory_batch ib inner join product p on p.id = ib.product_id where ib.status = 1 and p.status = 1 and ib.expiration_time >= now() and datediff('DAY', now(), ib.expiration_time) <= 30 and greatest(ib.stock_quantity - ib.locked_quantity - ib.sold_quantity, 0) > 0 and not exists ( select 1 from pricing_rule pr where pr.name = concat(#{acceptedRuleNamePrefix}, ib.batch_code) ) order by datediff('DAY', now(), ib.expiration_time) asc, availableStock desc, ib.id desc limit #{limit}
